purpose: Explicit inter-module dependency graph built from THEORY GRAPH v5. Provides co-activation weights, bottleneck risk scores, displacement targets, and success driver rankings for all 16 modules.

bottleneck_ranking.note: External filter gate. Activates after R5/R6. Not ranked by internal bottleneck weight.

APEASE.description: Pre-launch filter gate. Six criteria: A/P/E/Af/S/Eq. Direction 1: BPMS→DREFS→APEASE. Direction 2: APEASE→BPMS→DREFS.
APEASE.direction_1: after R5/R6: predict APEASE profile from active BCIO IDs
APEASE.direction_2: criterion failure → redesign BPMS → new DREFS forecast

_merged_bottleneck_forecast_rules.purpose: Explicit bottleneck detection rules, displacement forecasts, and node intervention predictions derived from THEORY GRAPH v5 failure_cluster, paradox types, and variability paths.

_merged_node_intervention_templates.purpose: Per-module intervention forecast templates. For each of the 13 modules covered in THEORY GRAPH, provides: predicted primary beneficiary, bottleneck displacement target, new bottleneck candidates, cascade risk, and success driver estimate when that module is strengthened.
_merged_node_intervention_templates.usage: Lookup by module name. Use 'predicted_effects' for node_intervention_forecast and 'success_driver_estimate' for success_driver_estimate outputs. Cross-reference 'theory_basis' for theory-linked explanation.
